figures.caption: Fig. 4: In the left subfigure, the confusion matrix for the Vanilla KD and ours on long-tailed CIFAR-10 (ρ = 50) are plotted. In the right figure, we show the comparison between different inner steps k on long-tailed CIFAR-100.
Fig. 3: Visualization of the meta outputs after training process with long-tailed CIFAR-100(ρ = 50). Each point corresponds to a training sample, with color indicating the value of assigned weight.
Fig. 2: This figure illustrates our framework.
Table 1: Test accuracy (%) on datasets with imbalance factors ρ. The table runs over three seeds and takes the average.
